scripts.test: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_guardrails.py -m regex -v
scripts.test:guardrail: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_guardrails.py -m 'regex or guardrail' -v
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && ruff check . && ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend && npx eslint . && npx prettier --check src/
scripts.lint:backend:fix: cd backend && ruff check --fix . && ruff format .
scripts.lint:frontend:fix: cd frontend && npx eslint --fix . && npx prettier --write src/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:infra && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:infra:fix && npm run lint:backend:fix && npm run lint:frontend:fix
scripts.eval: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. ALB_URL=${ALB_URL} python -m eval.run_eval
